message: Major session: Built episodic memory system with catalog + import from Android. Created time-grounding script. Complete template system overhaul (self-documenting ESSENTIAL.md, comprehensive guides, working examples). Rewrote memory/README.md explaining all subsystems. Discord integration: push notifications via GitHub Actions + instance-reports relay service (file-based queue bridges container→host→Discord). Solved filesystem isolation with Filesystem MCP tools. Total: ~8 hours across context compaction. System now has cross-instance coordination via Harold.
